lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you know my name? Have we met before?

lines.speaker: League Navigator
lines.text: The Sage tells all of us the names of those participating in their... event.

lines.speaker: League Navigator
lines.text: I'm here simply as an instrument of travel.

lines.speaker: League Navigator
lines.text: Would you like me to take you to the Stranglewood?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll stay here for now.

lines.speaker: League Navigator
lines.text: You know where to find me if you change your mind.
